arts.ttl: Man City v Palace: First Premier League game to use semi-automated offside technology
arts.sum: From Manchester City v Crystal Palace on Saturday, 12th April (12:30 BST) onwards, the Premier League will be utilising semi-automated offside technology (SAOT) to assist the Video Assistant Referee (VAR) in their decision making process.

arts.ttl: Manchester City launch sustainable travel competition along the Citylink walking route
arts.sum: Manchester City is excited to announce a new competition that encourages fans to travel sustainably to matches via the Citylink walking route to be in with the chance of winning a squad signed Manchester City 2024/45 home shirt. Upload Your Photo: Head to our Citizens Competition below or follow this link - Win a signed shirt by showcasing your matchday sustainable travel!

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner explains lack of Premier League minutes for Crystal Palace attacker since making Millwall switch
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says that Romain Esse’s lack of minutes for Crystal Palace has been due to the competitiveness of his attacking players. But Esse has played just one minute of Premier League football in the last seven games since his debut.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How much Nottingham Forest want for Morgan Gibbs-White now after Man City and Liverpool eye move
Manchester City can meet fee demand to sign Argentina international – Guardiola wish easy to grant
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen’s Exequiel Palacios has ended up on Manchester City’s transfer agenda, according to a report from Argentina. The Bundesliga winners signed the 26-year-old from River Plate in January 2020 and he has been a regular over the past few seasons. He’s played 33 games this season and his displays have caught Manchester City’s attention. arts.ttl: “Likely to sell” – Liverpool handed transfer boost but Man City pose threat to deal – exclusive
arts.sum: Liverpool have been handed a transfer boost as it looks likely that Freiburg will let talented young right-back Kiliann Sildillia leave this summer. Sources close to the situation have informed CaughtOffside that the Reds are showing a strong interest in Sildillia, along with rivals Manchester City. arts.ttl: Manchester City's Erling Haaland disguises himself as camera crew to surprise kids at event
arts.sum: The Manchester City striker joined forces with club mate Ilkay Gundogan and Kellogg's to launch the brand's new football shirt - and the return of its football camps

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Liverpool are confident they can beat Man City to their dream Kevin De Bruyne replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool feel confident about their chances of winning the race for the transfer of RB Leipzig star Xavi Simons this summer, CaughtOffside understands.
